title: sorbus cretica subsp. banatica
intro: Sorbus cretica subsp. banatica, also known as the Banatic whitebeam, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's bark, leaves, and roots are believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Sorbus cretica subsp. banatica is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
